# /blueprint

> Synthesis step that emits THREE roll-up docs from `inventory.json` + per-artifact docs + architecture inputs:
> 1. `docs-generated/inventory.md` (component-inventory synthesis)
> 2. `docs-generated/architecture/solution-blueprint.md`
> 3. `docs-generated/architecture/integration-topology.md`

## Usage

```
/blueprint [--project <name>]
```

## Pre-conditions

- `/scan` has emitted `inventory.json`
- `/document` has rendered per-artifact docs

## Inputs

- `_brownfield/inventory.json`
- `_brownfield/docs-generated/**` (per-artifact docs)
- `_brownfield/input/architecture/**` (optional supplementary architecture inputs)
- `templates/synthesis/component-inventory.template.md`
- `templates/synthesis/solution-blueprint.template.md`
- `templates/synthesis/integration-topology.template.md`

## Execution flow

### Component inventory

1. From `inventory.json`, emit per-platform counts per artifact-type
2. Render module-gated skips as info-level rows
3. Write `_brownfield/docs-generated/inventory.md`

### Solution blueprint

1. Build C4-L1 system context: actors + external systems + the existing solution
2. Build C4-L2 containers: top-level platforms + their main containers (function-apps, model-driven apps, Power Pages site)
3. Build per-platform C4-L3 component diagrams (Mermaid flowchart per platform)
4. Build solution-layering table from CE solutions + FO models
5. Build security topology table from security roles + FLS profiles + table permissions + FO duties
6. Build cross-agent integration contracts table from integration-asset artefacts that cross platform boundaries
7. Build NFR matrix from per-artifact NFR sections
8. Build risk register from gap-log entries (severity-rollup) + heuristic anti-patterns
9. Build ADR roll-up by aggregating ADR citations across per-artifact docs
10. Validate (`validate_evidence_chain`, `validate_no_grouping`)
11. Write `_brownfield/docs-generated/architecture/solution-blueprint.md`

### Integration topology

1. Build system context for integration surface
2. Build per-pattern sequence diagrams (one Mermaid sequenceDiagram per integration-asset)
3. Build ADF dataflow lineage Mermaid (source → staging → conformed → consumed-by)
4. Build interface catalogue table
5. Build security topology subset for integration: managed identities, key vaults, private endpoints, NSG rules
6. Build observability surface: App Insights / Log Analytics / alert rules / custom metrics
7. Detect anti-patterns (e.g., no DLQ on long-running Functions; secrets in app settings instead of Key Vault)
8. Validate
9. Write `_brownfield/docs-generated/architecture/integration-topology.md`

## Output

- `projects/{p}/_brownfield/docs-generated/inventory.md`
- `projects/{p}/_brownfield/docs-generated/architecture/solution-blueprint.md`
- `projects/{p}/_brownfield/docs-generated/architecture/integration-topology.md`
